career_angle: LLM developments affect every developer. Understand the capabilities and limitations - knowing what AI can't do is as valuable as knowing what it can.

factors.name: Source Authority
factors.rationale: 'OpenAI and Anthropic go to war: Claude Opus 4.6 vs GPT 5....' -- AI News (smol.ai) is unclassified or low-reliability source (tier_5, reliability: 20%) reporting on OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Meta. Cites: according to this announcement

factors.name: Evidence Quality
factors.rationale: references specific benchmarks: arXiv paper reference, GitHub repository, HuggingFace model/dataset, GPQA benchmark, ARC-AGI benchmark; references academic work; specific figures cited: 't benchmarks with 25%', 'rminalBench 2 = 65.4%', 'nd together with ~40%'

factors.name: Reproducibility
factors.rationale: links to GitHub repository and HuggingFace model/dataset; methodology described

factors.name: Consensus
factors.rationale: 'OpenAI and Anthropic go to war: Claude Opus 4.6 vs GPT 5....' uses heavy hype language (10.0/10) -- claim likely ahead of expert consensus; hedging language ('up to ', 'as much as', 'potentially') suggests the source itself isn't confident

factors.name: Specificity
factors.rationale: vague hedging: 'up to ', 'as much as', 'potentially', 'could be'; cites concrete figures: 't benchmarks with 25%', 'rminalBench 2 = 65.4%', 'nd together with ~40%'

factors.name: Track Record
factors.rationale: AI News (smol.ai) on OpenAI/Anthropic topics -- insufficient history to assess
